title: BMX Plus! — Radical Rick Premier Issue
alt: January 1980 issue of BMX Plus! preserved in a binder, with a BMX racer on the cover.
summary: A January 1980 issue of BMX Plus! identified in the Lititz BMX inventory as the Radical Rick premier issue. The cover date is directly visible in the supplied photograph; the premiere attribution is preserved as the collection’s published identification and remains open to bibliographic verification.
provenance: Current Lititz BMX holding; acquisition details were not supplied in the source record.
claims: The “premier issue” designation is an attributed inventory statement, not independently verified by the cover photograph.
details: Preserved in a protective binder sleeve.
The words “Radical Rick” are not visible on the photographed cover.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
